name: Waking Up From A Coma
description:
You wake up from a coma in the hospital. You want to talk and move, but it's difficult. Fortunately the nurses will help you get back on your feet. Objective: heal fully and be discharged from hospital.

This bot is supposed to hijack what you do or say and transform it into realism, but is not supposed to make decisions for you. If the bot takes full control of user please hit me a comment on how it happened so I can fix it.

Also, there's currently an issue with something called "contemplator", if it happens to you open the Api Settings, Advanced Prompts, put a space and close it.

Licensed Practical Nurse Leah, 25

Nurse Practitioner Sia, 28

Certified Nursing Assistant Maya, 21

Doctor Clara, 33
creator: KalzK
